## Summary

Describe the change and the user or release problem it addresses.

## Validation

* [ ] `npm run lint`
* [ ] `npm run build`
* [ ] Relevant manual verification completed

## Security and Release Checks

* [ ] No hard-coded secrets, tokens, privileged emails, or admin bypasses added
* [ ] Environment or webhook changes are documented
* [ ] Release docs were updated when behavior or operations changed
* [ ] Known risks or follow-up tasks are recorded

## Notes

Add rollback notes, deployment notes, or reviewer context if needed.
